简介
夜幕降临，魔影共舞。
真正觉醒的夜魔侠（查理·考克斯 Charlie Cox 饰）将与金并（文森特·多诺费奥 Vincent D'Onofrio 饰）正面交锋，揭开纽约市权力风起云涌的幕后真相。

本资源已做如下精简处理（便于收藏观看）：

去片头：去除剧集片头、前情回顾等所有影片开始部分（包括视频中部的片头，非伪去头）
去片尾：去除剧集演职员表、下集预告等所有影片结束部分
去广告：去除剧集中任意位置的广告
片头调整：当第一集片头在视频中部时，会调整片头位置至片首，彻底解放双手

片长: 51分钟

编剧: Justin Benson, Aaron Moorhead

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
剧情概要:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
. Daredevil is in hiding, but he isn't laying low. A shadowy player from Washington, D.C. emerges.
. As Mayor Fisk and his anti vigilante task force crackdown on New York City, Daredevil intercepts a ship bringing military ordnance weapons into the city. The hero continues his struggle against Fisk and his men, who are rounding up anyone who opposes them.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
. Charlie Cox
. Vincent D'Onofrio
. Margarita Levieva
. Arty Froushan
. Nikki M. James
. Ayelet Zurer
. Michael Gandolfini
. Zabryna Guevara
. Clark Johnson
. Deborah Ann Woll
